mstts:express-as.prosody: 歡迎來到專案執行與交付篇。 在規劃之後，就是緊湊的執行與交付。

prosody.lang: 曉臻，我站起來了！不要坐下！

mstts:express-as.prosody: Phoebe，你在幹嘛？為什麼不坐下？

prosody.lang: 這是站立會議！如果你坐下，會議就會拖太久！

mstts:express-as.prosody: 哈，很有 Agile 的精神喔！這集我們就來談談敏捷開發與執行流程。 敏捷開發是目前業界的主流方法論，讓我們首先來認識它的核心詞彙。

speak.voice: 敏捷
Agile... Agile methodology focuses on delivering small, incremental changes rapidly.
敏捷方法論專注於快速交付小型的漸進式變更。
衝刺
Sprint... We plan our tasks for the upcoming two-week sprint.
我們為接下來兩週的衝刺規劃任務。
速率
Velocity... Our team velocity has increased over the last few sprints.
我們團隊的速率在過去幾個衝刺中有所增加。
燃盡圖
Burndown Chart... A steep drop in the burndown chart indicates a lot of tasks were completed.
燃盡圖中的陡峭下降表示完成了許多任務。
回顧會議
Retrospective... We discuss what went well and what didn't in the retrospective.
我們在回顧會議中討論哪些做得好，哪些做得不好。
待辦清單
Backlog... Prioritize items in the product backlog for the next release.
我們為下一次發布排定產品待辦事項的優先順序。

mstts:express-as.prosody: 敏捷開發有哪些重要的會議？

prosody.lang: 像是 Kick-off、Stand-up 和 Retrospective，這些會議術語是敏捷開發的儀式感所在。

speak.voice: 啟動會議
Kick-off... The project kick-off meeting is scheduled for tomorrow.
專案啟動會議排定在明天。
衝刺規劃
Sprint Planning... We estimate task complexity during sprint planning.
我們在衝刺規劃時估算任務複雜度。
每日站立會議
Daily Stand-up... I'll give my update at the daily stand-up.
我會在每日站立會議報告我的進度。
估算
Estimation... What is your time estimation for completing this feature? My estimation was off because I did not account for the integration testing time; always add a buffer.
你對完成這個功能的時間估算是多少？ 我的估算有誤，因為我沒有把整合測試時間計算進去；永遠要加上緩衝時間。
完成
Done... Definition of Done means coded, tested, and documented.
「完成」的定義意指已編碼、已測試且已撰寫文件。 有效管理任務狀態能避免進度延遲，接下來讓我們來看看常見的看板狀態。

prosody.lang: Speaking of status, my favorite status is "Done". My least favorite is "Blocked by Meetings".

speak.voice: 待辦事項
To-do... Add this bug fix to your to-do list for today.
把這個 Bug 修復加到你今天的待辦事項清單。
進行中
In Progress... The ticket status is currently In Progress.
這張票的狀態目前是進行中。
阻礙
Blocker... Please report any blockers immediately to the Scrum Master.
請立即向 Scrum Master 回報任何阻礙。
範圍蔓延
Scope Creep... Scope creep happens when new features are added without adjusting the timeline.
當新增功能卻未調整時間軸時，就會發生範圍蔓延。
優先級
Priority... Set the priority to High for this critical bug.
將這個嚴重 Bug 的優先級設為高。
嚴重性
Severity... This is a high severity bug causing data loss.

這是一個導致資料遺失的高嚴重性 Bug。
接下來我們看看 QA 相關的術語，品質保證與驗收是交付前的最後一哩路。

prosody.lang: I love QA. They find the bugs so I don't have to fix them on the weekend.

speak.voice: 品質保證
使用者驗收測試
UAT... UAT stands for User Acceptance Testing. The client signed off after a successful UAT.
UAT 是使用者驗收測試的縮寫。 客戶在成功的 UAT 後簽署了驗收。
熱修復
Hotfix... We need to deploy a hotfix to production immediately.
我們需要立即部署熱修復到正式環境。
發布
Release... The release is scheduled for next Tuesday.
發布排定在下週二。
簽核
Sign-off... We need final sign-off from the client before launch.
發布前我們需要客戶的最終簽核。
修補程式
Hotfix... We need to release a hotfix immediately to patch the hole.
我們需要立即發布 Hotfix 來修補這個漏洞。

mstts:express-as.prosody: 產品上線後，維運與持續整合是確保穩定運行的關鍵。

prosody.lang: Rule number one: Never deploy on a Friday. And rule number two: Pay your Tech Debt!

mstts:express-as.prosody: 修正這些錯字是能快速獲得成果的容易目標。
有些問題是系統性的嗎？

prosody.lang: 沒錯，我們稱之為「技術債」，需要定期償還。

speak.voice: 技術債
Tech Debt... We need to pay down tech debt to improve system stability.
我們需要償還技術債以改善系統穩定性。
部署
Deploy... We will deploy the hotfix to production tonight.
我們今晚會部署 Hotfix 到正式環境。
回滾
Rollback... We had to rollback the deployment due to a crash.
因為當機，我們必須回滾這次部署。
變更紀錄
Changelog... Check the changelog for details on what's new.
查看變更紀錄以了解更新細節。
功能切換
Feature Flag... Use a feature flag to verify the code in production safely.
使用功能切換來安全地在正式環境驗證程式碼。
維護
Maintenance... The system is under scheduled maintenance for upgrades.
系統正在進行排程維護以進行升級。
跨功能
Cross-functional... We work in a cross-functional team with designers and QA.
我們與設計師和 QA 在跨功能團隊中工作。
DORA 指標

D O R A... D O R A stands for DevOps Research and Assessment. The D O R A metrics track deployment frequency, lead time for changes, change failure rate, and time to restore service to measure engineering team performance.
DORA 是 DevOps Research and Assessment 的縮寫。 DORA 指標追蹤部署頻率、變更前置時間、變更失敗率和服務恢復時間，以衡量工程團隊績效。

mstts:express-as.prosody: 敏捷開發的時候，速率忽高忽低怎麼辦？
Velocity is an estimation tool, not a KPI. Use the Retrospective to find out why. Maybe there were hidden technical debts?
還有待辦清單要定期整理，不然會變成垃圾場。
A groomed Backlog is a happy backlog. Prioritize ruthlessly.
專案的成功往往取決於細節的執行。 我是主持人曉臻，謝謝大家的收聽，再會！
And I'm Phoebe. Thanks for listening!
